CustomField.description: This field is used to specify whether the table is a Ratio or a Matrix type. Depending on the selection, the corresponding fields for the child record will be displayed for input.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field is used to specify whether the table is a Ratio or a Matrix type. Depending on the selection, the corresponding fields for the child record will be displayed for input.
CustomField.label: Rate Basis
